emails.body: 98-1534 Daren, The above mentioned meter (delivery) shows a small flow of 24 dec. on 2-1-00. The sitara deal (151694) has a stop date of 1/31/2000. Can you please extend the deal thru 2-1-00 to cover this small volume? Thanks -Jackie-
